description_long: This object consists of a group of four round, golden-brown baked goods with a slightly rough, crumbly surface and numerous dark chocolate chips embedded throughout. The items are arranged in a loose cluster, with some overlapping and casting soft shadows on the surface below. The texture appears soft and slightly uneven, with visible cracks and a rustic, homemade appearance. The chocolate chips are distributed irregularly, some partially melted into the dough, giving a rich, appetizing look. There is no visible frosting, wrapper, or decorative elements present. The objects are shown resting on a plain, white background with no visible plate or support.
description: A cluster of four golden-brown, chocolate chip-studded baked goods with a soft, crumbly texture and rustic appearance. No frosting, wrapper, or decorations are visible.
description_view_0: Three of the baked goods are clearly visible from the side, showing their thickness and the distribution of chocolate chips, with one partially stacked on top.
description_view_1: The view highlights the tops of the baked goods, emphasizing the uneven, chip-studded surfaces and the overlapping arrangement.
description_view_2: A top-down view reveals all four baked goods in a tight cluster, with chocolate chips scattered across the surfaces.
description_view_3: This angle shows the sides and some undersides, emphasizing the thickness and the irregular, rustic edges of the baked goods.
